payload.answer: I can offer a few ways to record this statement without committing to any one interpretation.
citations: Nur and Sara are my twin daughters
repair_options: Record as one combined fact: Nur and Sara are twin daughters.
Record as two separate daughter facts and note they are twins.
Keep the names together but preserve ambiguity about whether both are daughters vs. daughters-in-law/other relation, until confirmed.
